title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to real time Signal Processing: Basic elements of Real-Time
Signal Processing Systems, Analog Interface- Sampling, Quantization and
encoding, Smoothing filters, data converters, DSP hardware- DSP hardware
options, Digital signal processors, Fixed point and floating point processors,
Real time constraints, DSP System Design - Algorithm development, Selection
of DSP hardware, software development and tools

title: Module 2
content:
Introduction to Digital Signal Processor: Introduction to a popular DSP from
Texas Instruments, CPU Architecture, CPU Data Paths and Control, Timers,
Interrupts, Internal Data/ Program Memory, External Memory Interface,
pipelining, Number system (Fixed and floating point format), Fixed point
Instruction Set and Addressing Modes, TMS 320C67XX CPU Simple
programming examples using C and assembly.

title: Module 3
content:
Filter Design: FIR & IIR Digital Filter Design, filter Design programs using
MATLAB, Fourier Transform: DFT, FFT programs using MATLAB

title: Module 4
content:
Digital signal generation and detection: Sine wave generators- Lookup
table method, linear Chirp signal, Noise generators- Linear Congruential
Sequence generator, Pseudo random binary sequence generator, White
colour and Gaussian noise, DTMF Generation and Detection-DTMF
Generator and Detector.
Project based learning (8 hrs)
’éĘ The objective of Project based learning to strengthen the understanding of studentŌĆÖs
fundamentals through effective application of theoretical concepts.  Projects can help to boost
studentŌĆÖs skills and widen the horizon of their thinking.
’éĘ The ultimate aim of an engineering student is to resolve a problem by applying theoretical
knowledge.
’éĘ In the beginning, students shall be given an awareness and/or guideline on how to implement
and learn this course through a project and form groups in the first few weeks.
’éĘ Each group should identify a project that can be done to understand a part of the contents of
this course and perform a literature survey.
’éĘ Choose a suitable platform for your application and the input output devices to be interfaced.
’éĘ Develop the block diagram and present before the jury within first month after the
commencement of classes.
’éĘ Implement necessary hardware and software to develop the prototype.
’éĘ Prepare a report and present before the jury for final evaluation.
